notes: Sam.py/fight_system remains authoritative for license, scroll, cooldown, target, and implementation checks.

id_index.name: 1000 Needles
id_index.description: Deal 1,000 damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Achilles
id_index.description: Render one foe vulnerable to an additional element.

id_index.name: Addle
id_index.description: Lowers magick power.

id_index.name: Aegis Step
id_index.description: Defensive repositioning move inspired by shield-and-bow combat. Grants brief evasion and block focus.

id_index.name: Arcane Guard
id_index.description: Reduces magickal damage taken for 2 turns.

id_index.name: Arsenal Quip
id_index.description: Temporarily copy or manifest the weapon of an owned summon for 7 minutes. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

id_index.name: Aurora
id_index.description: Apply a regeneration effect to self or one ally.

id_index.name: Baleful Echo
id_index.description: Recasts the last spell with halved MP cost, but with a chance to misfire or backfire.

id_index.name: Black Box Revival
id_index.description: If the user would be knocked unconscious or killed, one active summon may sacrifice itself to prevent the final blow. Cooldown: 1 week.

id_index.name: Blasting Zone
id_index.description: Fire a concentrated aether blast from the gunblade for heavy damage.

id_index.name: Blink Step
id_index.description: Evade next attack and reposition instantly.

id_index.name: Blitz
id_index.description: Deal physical damage to targets in range.

id_index.name: Bloodfest
id_index.description: Instantly load Powder Cartridges for burst damage windows.

id_index.name: Bonecrusher
id_index.description: Consume HP to reduce the HP of one foe to 0.

id_index.name: Bow Shock
id_index.description: Release an explosive shockwave that damages enemies over time.

id_index.name: Brutal Shell
id_index.description: Follow Keen Edge with a guarded blast, dealing damage and granting a small barrier.

id_index.name: Burst Strike
id_index.description: Spend one Powder Cartridge to deliver a heavy gunblade explosion.

id_index.name: Camouflage
id_index.description: Increase evasion and reduce incoming physical damage for several turns.

id_index.name: Challenge
id_index.description: Force a single enemy to attack you for a short time.

id_index.name: Charge
id_index.description: Restores MP but may fail.

id_index.name: Charm
id_index.description: Cause one foe to Confuse friend with foe.

id_index.name: Continuation
id_index.description: Follow certain cartridge attacks with an extra precision blast.

id_index.name: Corpse Relay
id_index.description: Use an active summon as a battlefield relay point for targeting, pressure, and tactical awareness.

id_index.name: Counterblow
id_index.description: Take an enemy attack and return it upon the attacker as physical damage.

id_index.name: Counterspell
id_index.description: Take an enemy attack and return it upon the attacker as magick damage.

id_index.name: Cover
id_index.description: Intercept damage meant for one ally.

id_index.name: Cover Breach
id_index.description: Overload deployed cover to create pushback, smoke, stagger, or heated shrapnel.

id_index.name: Covering Fire
id_index.description: Allies gain Dodge advantage; interrupts enemy charges.

id_index.name: Dead Man's Trigger
id_index.description: When a Loyal Summon is destroyed, it may perform one final action before vanishing.

id_index.name: Deathblow
id_index.description: Attempt to instantly slay a target at low HP.

id_index.name: Demon Slaughter
id_index.description: Finish the area combo and load one Powder Cartridge.

id_index.name: Demon Slice
id_index.description: Perform a sweeping gunblade strike against multiple enemies.

id_index.name: Despair Gaze
id_index.description: Inflicts Fear and causes target to randomly skip turns.

id_index.name: Double Down
id_index.description: Spend two Powder Cartridges to unleash a devastating point-blank detonation.

id_index.name: Echo Mark
id_index.description: Mark one enemy, improving summon tracking and granting a small bonus to Extraction if the marked target dies.

id_index.name: Elude
id_index.description: Defend with a high probability of evading enemy attacks.

id_index.name: Entrench
id_index.description: Defend and prepare a counterattack, dealing more damage the longer you defend.

id_index.name: Erasure
id_index.description: Nullifies all active buffs on one enemy, including barrier, regen, and reflect effects.

id_index.name: Evade
id_index.description: Attempt to evade enemy attacks. Certain attacks cannot be evaded.

id_index.name: Expose
id_index.description: Lower one foe's defense.

id_index.name: Extraction
id_index.description: When an enemy or NPC is dead, the user gains three D100 attempts to bind the corpse as a Loyal Summon. Cooldown is 1-2 weeks depending on summon size and DM approval.

id_index.name: First Aid
id_index.description: Restore HP to one HP Critical ally.

id_index.name: Foresight
id_index.description: Reveal the target’s intended action next turn, increasing evasion.

id_index.name: Gil Toss
id_index.description: Throw gil to damage all foes in range.

id_index.name: Gnashing Fang
id_index.description: Spend one Powder Cartridge to begin a brutal three-part gunblade chain.

id_index.name: Gravebound Reload
id_index.description: Reload or recharge one firearm by drawing residual energy from a corpse, destroyed summon, or battlefield remnant.

id_index.name: Guard
id_index.description: Reduces physical and magick damage taken from enemy attacks while guarding.

id_index.name: Guard Counter
id_index.description: Enter a guarding stance, then retaliate after blocking a hit.

id_index.name: Heart of Corundum
id_index.description: Upgrade Heart of Stone with stronger mitigation and emergency healing.

id_index.name: Heart of Light
id_index.description: Reduce magical damage taken by the party for several turns.

id_index.name: Heart of Stone
id_index.description: Grant a defensive barrier to self or one ally.

id_index.name: Heavy Guard
id_index.description: Greatly reduces physical and magick damage taken while guarding, but at a higher ATB cost.

id_index.name: Heroic Guard
id_index.description: Massively reduces physical and magick damage taken while guarding, but at a very high ATB cost.

id_index.name: Highwind
id_index.description: Release a catastrophic jump strike, clearing chain gauges. Damage varies by situation.

id_index.name: Hollowpoint Round
id_index.description: Fires armor-piercing shot. Ignores partial Defense.

id_index.name: Horology
id_index.description: Deals time-based damage.

id_index.name: Infuse
id_index.description: Fully consume user's MP, changing one ally's HP to 10 times that amount.

id_index.name: Keen Edge
id_index.description: Strike with the opening cut of the gunblade combo.

id_index.name: Launch
id_index.description: Attack and launch a staggered target into the air.

id_index.name: Libra
id_index.description: Reveal detailed information about targets.

id_index.name: Libra II
id_index.description: Reveal detailed information about Chaos Inflicted targets.

id_index.name: Light Guard
id_index.description: Slightly reduces physical and magick damage taken while guarding. Low ATB cost.

id_index.name: Magick Counter
id_index.description: Chance to counter with a random spell when hit by magick.

id_index.name: Mediguard
id_index.description: Defend while gradually recovering HP.

id_index.name: Nebula
id_index.description: Greatly reduce incoming damage for a short time.

id_index.name: NulAll Guard
id_index.description: Reduces damage taken while guarding and greatly reduces elemental-attribute damage.

id_index.name: Numerology
id_index.description: Damage increases with hits.

id_index.name: Poach
id_index.description: Capture weakened foes for loot.

id_index.name: Power Focus
id_index.description: Increases next magick's power by 50%.

id_index.name: Provoke
id_index.description: Entices enemies to attack you instead of allies.

id_index.name: Revive
id_index.description: Fully consume user's HP, reviving and fully restoring HP of one KO'd ally.

id_index.name: Royal Guard
id_index.description: Assume a tank stance, increasing threat generated and improving defensive posture.

id_index.name: Ruin
id_index.description: Deal non-elemental magick damage to one target.

id_index.name: Ruinga
id_index.description: Deal non-elemental magick damage to targets within a wide radius.

id_index.name: Savage Claw
id_index.description: Second strike of the Gnashing Fang chain.

id_index.name: Shades of Black
id_index.description: Cast a random black magick on one foe.

id_index.name: Shadow Dance
id_index.description: Swap places with an owned active summon. Cooldown: 50 seconds.

id_index.name: Shear
id_index.description: Lowers magick resistance.

id_index.name: Sight Unseeing
id_index.description: Unleash an attack only available when blind.

id_index.name: Smite
id_index.description: Deal heavy damage to a launched target about to recover from stagger.

id_index.name: Solid Barrel
id_index.description: Complete the core combo and load one Powder Cartridge.

id_index.name: Souleater
id_index.description: Consume HP to deal damage to one foe.

id_index.name: Soulshred
id_index.description: Deals high non-elemental damage and reduces MP of target based on caster's missing HP.

id_index.name: Sovereign Fist
id_index.description: Crush foes with a ruinous blow, clearing chain gauges. Damage varies by situation.

id_index.name: Spellblade
id_index.description: Imbue weapon with a selected element for 3 turns.

id_index.name: Stamp
id_index.description: Transfers status effects.

id_index.name: Steal
id_index.description: Steal from one foe.

id_index.name: Steelguard
id_index.description: Reduces damage taken while guarding. Guard becomes more effective each time damage is taken.

id_index.name: Summon Fusion
id_index.description: Temporarily resonate with an owned Loyal Summon to use part of that summon’s abilities. Cooldown: at least 4 days.

id_index.name: Superbolide
id_index.description: Drop to critical HP to become nearly immune to damage for a short duration.

id_index.name: Suppressive Burst
id_index.description: Reduces enemy movement and disables reactions for 1 turn.

id_index.name: Telekinesis
id_index.description: Allow melee weapons to hit distant targets.

id_index.name: Traveler
id_index.description: deals fixed damage to an enemy and enemies in range in its vicinity based on the number of steps currently taken. After being used, or after 1000 steps, the counter resets..

id_index.name: Trick Reload
id_index.description: Reloads and dodges simultaneously. Grants temporary Evasion.

id_index.name: Vein Tap
id_index.description: Restores MP equal to the number of active illusions when cast.

id_index.name: Vendetta
id_index.description: Counterattack after defending, dealing more damage the more you are attacked.

id_index.name: Vital Shot
id_index.description: Target weak point to deal bonus damage and apply Bleed.

id_index.name: Wicked Talon
id_index.description: Final strike of the Gnashing Fang chain.

id_index.name: Wither
id_index.description: Lower one foe's strength.
